news.title:
CG Power executed an NSE block trade of Rs. 25.81 cr.
The trade involved 340,213 shares at Rs. 758.50 per share.
news.summary:
CG Power executed an NSE block trade of Rs. 25.81 cr.
The trade involved 340,213 shares at Rs. 758.50 per share.

news.title:
Power demand growth under 1.5% for 21 months, projected to hit 6% by FY27.
CG Power may benefit from capacity expansion, per Axis Capital's Sumit Kishore.
news.summary:
Power demand growth under 1.5% for 21 months, projected to hit 6% by FY27.
CG Power may benefit from capacity expansion, per Axis Capital's Sumit Kishore.

news.title:
CG Power's subsidiary Axiro invests in EdgeCortix for AI chip development.
Axiro specializes in IC design; MPower Partners backs growth with ESG focus.
news.summary:
CG Power's subsidiary Axiro invests in EdgeCortix for AI chip development.
Axiro specializes in IC design; MPower Partners backs growth with ESG focus.

news.title:
CG Power announces senior management changes in corporate update.
Business Standard clarifies no journalist involvement in the content.
news.summary:
CG Power announces senior management changes in corporate update.
Business Standard clarifies no journalist involvement in the content.

news.title:
CG International Holdings sold its stake in PT Crompton Prima Switchgear Indonesia.
PT Crompton Prima Switchgear Indonesia is no longer a subsidiary of CG Power.
news.summary:
CG International Holdings sold its stake in PT Crompton Prima Switchgear Indonesia.
PT Crompton Prima Switchgear Indonesia is no longer a subsidiary of CG Power.

news.title: CG Power & Industrial Solutions allots 3,640 equity shares under ESOP.
news.summary: CG Power & Industrial Solutions allots 3,640 equity shares under ESOP.

news.title: UBS raises price target for CG Power, citing the worst is mostly over.
news.summary: UBS raises price target for CG Power, citing the worst is mostly over.

news.title:
UBS raises CG Power target price to ₹900 from ₹840, implying 32% upside.
CG Power's Q3 margins dipped due to ₹40 cr loss in semiconductor segment.
news.summary:
UBS raises CG Power target price to ₹900 from ₹840, implying 32% upside.
CG Power's Q3 margins dipped due to ₹40 cr loss in semiconductor segment.

news.title:
CG Power's EVP and SBU Head, Sriram Rangarajan, resigns effective 19th March 2026.
Resignation cited personal reasons; company ensures compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.
news.summary:
CG Power's EVP and SBU Head, Sriram Rangarajan, resigns effective 19th March 2026.
Resignation cited personal reasons; company ensures compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.

news.title:
CG Power exits Indonesia JV; ARM sells 51% CPSI stake to PT Prima for IDR 1.
CPSI will no longer remain a subsidiary of CG Power.
news.summary:
CG Power exits Indonesia JV; ARM sells 51% CPSI stake to PT Prima for IDR 1.
CPSI will no longer remain a subsidiary of CG Power.

news.title:
CG Power's subsidiary CPSI to sell a 51% stake to PLNE for IDR 1.
CPSI is non-operational with no revenue last year; deal to close by 31st March 2026.
news.summary:
CG Power's subsidiary CPSI to sell a 51% stake to PLNE for IDR 1.
CPSI is non-operational with no revenue last year; deal to close by 31st March 2026.

news.title:
Murugappa Group stocks show divergence; Cholamandalam down 6%, Tube Investments, CG Power gain 2-2.5%.
Vellayan Subbiah to exit Cholamandalam, consolidates holdings in Tube Investments and CG Power.
news.summary:
Murugappa Group stocks show divergence; Cholamandalam down 6%, Tube Investments, CG Power gain 2-2.5%.
Vellayan Subbiah to exit Cholamandalam, consolidates holdings in Tube Investments and CG Power.

news.title:
CG Power sells assets of Indonesian subsidiary CPSI for IDR155B.
Proceeds to clear liabilities; no adverse financial impact expected.
news.summary:
CG Power sells assets of Indonesian subsidiary CPSI for IDR155B.
Proceeds to clear liabilities; no adverse financial impact expected.

news.title:
Kaynes Tech, Dixon, CG Power shares rose up to 5% after Budget 2026 announcements.
Finance Minister announced ISM 2.0, increased electronics outlay to ₹40,000 crore to boost the sector.
news.summary:
Kaynes Tech, Dixon, CG Power shares rose up to 5% after Budget 2026 announcements.
Finance Minister announced ISM 2.0, increased electronics outlay to ₹40,000 crore to boost the sector.

news.title:
Railway stocks likely to gain from 15% rise in FY26 railway capex, focusing on execution, safety upgrades, and capacity expansion.
RITES, Titagarh Rail Systems, CG Power, HBL Power, and Kernex Microsystems seen as beneficiaries of modernization and infrastructure thrust.
news.summary:
Railway stocks likely to gain from 15% rise in FY26 railway capex, focusing on execution, safety upgrades, and capacity expansion.
RITES, Titagarh Rail Systems, CG Power, HBL Power, and Kernex Microsystems seen as beneficiaries of modernization and infrastructure thrust.

news.title:
CG Power's former promoter Algavista Greentech reclassified; shareholding now 0%.
The company applied to exchanges for no objection, indicating promoter group status change.
news.summary:
CG Power's former promoter Algavista Greentech reclassified; shareholding now 0%.
The company applied to exchanges for no objection, indicating promoter group status change.

news.title:
CG Power's subsidiary G.G. Tronics secured a ₹433.34 crore KAVACH order from Indian Railways.
The order includes supply, installation, and 11-year maintenance, to be executed within 1 year.
news.summary:
CG Power's subsidiary G.G. Tronics secured a ₹433.34 crore KAVACH order from Indian Railways.
The order includes supply, installation, and 11-year maintenance, to be executed within 1 year.

news.title:
CG Power faces Rs. 467.8 crore tax demand for AY 2021-22; appeal filed.
IT Dept granted stay, Rs. 28.1 crore payable in 3 installments; appeal pending.
news.summary:
CG Power faces Rs. 467.8 crore tax demand for AY 2021-22; appeal filed.
IT Dept granted stay, Rs. 28.1 crore payable in 3 installments; appeal pending.

news.title:
CG Power shares surged 7% despite missing profit and margin estimates.
JPMorgan lowered its target for CG Power following the results.
news.summary:
CG Power shares surged 7% despite missing profit and margin estimates.
JPMorgan lowered its target for CG Power following the results.

news.title:
CG Power's EV motor and controller approvals near completion; passenger trials to start in 4-5 weeks.
Brownfield switchgear expansion nearing completion, expected to add INR 400 crores in revenue.
news.summary:
CG Power's EV motor and controller approvals near completion; passenger trials to start in 4-5 weeks.
